description: GCP Network ImportData — VPC + subnetwork + Cloud NAT topology.

cidrBlock.description: Primary subnetwork CIDR block used for internal firewall rules.

isByoVpc.description: True when the VPC is owned outside this stack.

routerSelfLink.description: Cloud Router self-link backing Cloud NAT (when created).

subnetSelfLinks.description: Subnetwork self-links across the configured regions.

vpcSelfLink.description:
VPC self-link. Absent when the controller will look up the
default network at runtime.
